recap:
- A Knowledge Assistant built with Agent Bricks is a transparent system based on Databricks architecture, essential for debugging and governance.
- Data ingestion relies on Unity Catalog Volumes, where users select files (PDF, DOCX, HTML) for processing.
- The ai_parse_document function extracts text, tables, and images from documents, converting visual elements into a format understandable by the LLM.
- The Mosaic AI Vector Search indexes parsed data using managed embeddings and automatically updates when new files are added, ensuring up-to-date knowledge retrieval.
- The reasoning engine processes user queries by converting them into vectors, retrieving relevant information, and providing citations linked to the source files for accuracy verification.
- The Quality Loop includes a Review App that allows stakeholders to interact with the agent and give feedback, enhancing the system's performance and relevance.
